programme.title: Port Adelaide Power vs Essendon Bombers
programme.desc: Two teams chasing their first win of the season. Plus, former Port Adelaide coach Ken Hinkley joins Fox Footy in the commentary box.

programme.title: Geelong Cats vs Adelaide Crows
programme.desc: Geelong take on Adelaide in Round 3.

programme.title: Collingwood Magpies vs Greater Western Sydney Giants
programme.desc: The Pies and Giants clash in Round 3.

programme.title: St Kilda Saints vs Brisbane Lions
programme.desc: The Saints host the Lions in Round 3.

programme.title: Essendon Bombers vs North Melbourne Kangaroos
programme.desc: The Bombers host the Roos in Round 3.

programme.title: Port Adelaide Power vs West Coast Eagles
programme.desc: The Power and Eagles go head to head in Round 3.

programme.title: Brisbane Lions vs Collingwood Magpies
programme.desc: The Lions host the Pies in Round 4.

programme.title: North Melbourne Kangaroos vs Carlton Blues
programme.desc: The Roos and Blues meet in Round 4.

programme.title: Richmond Tigers vs Port Adelaide Power
programme.desc: The Tigers meet the Power in Round 4.

programme.title: Giants Netball vs Melbourne Vixens
programme.desc: The Giants look for their first win of the season as they host last years champions at Qudos Bank Arena.

programme.title: NSW Swifts vs Mavericks
programme.desc: The Swifts will look to kickstart their season after a disappointing round 1 loss as they host the Mavericks in Sydney.

programme.title: Mavericks vs Melbourne Vixens
programme.desc: The first Melbourne derby of the season sees the Mavericks and Vixens clash at John Cain Arena.

programme.title: Queensland Firebirds vs Adelaide Thunderbirds
programme.desc: The Firebirds host the Thunderbirds in Adelaide.

programme.title: West Coast Fever vs Giants Netball
programme.desc: The Fever host the Giants in Perth.

programme.title: West Coast Eagles vs North Melbourne Kangaroos
programme.desc: Round 2 concludes when the Kangaroos travel to WA after their stirring victory last weekend.

programme.title: Fremantle Dockers vs Richmond Tigers
programme.desc: The Dockers and Tigers collide in Round 3.

programme.title: Carlton Blues vs Melbourne Demons
programme.desc: Patrick Cripps leads the Blues against the Dees in Round 3.

programme.title: Adelaide Crows vs Fremantle Dockers
programme.desc: The Crows and Dockers face off in Round 4.

programme.title: West Coast v Sydney
programme.desc: Old rivals West Coast and Sydney meet in Round 4.

programme.title: North Queensland vs Gold Coast Titans
programme.desc: Added incentive for this Queensland Derby clash as both teams chase a breakthrough victory in 2026.

programme.title: Warriors vs Wests Tigers
programme.desc: Watch Round 4 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: Canterbury vs Newcastle
programme.desc: Watch Round 4 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: Penrith vs Parramatta
programme.desc: Watch Round 4 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: North Queensland vs Melbourne
programme.desc: Watch Round 4 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: Titans v Dragons
programme.desc: Watch Round 4 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: St George Illawarra vs North Queensland
programme.desc: Watch Round 5 of the NRL on Kayo.

programme.title: Japanese Grand Prix
programme.desc: After a week’s break, Formula 1 returns to the Suzuka Circuit for the opening practice session.

programme.title: Japanese Grand Prix
programme.desc: The Formula 1 drivers are back out at Suzuka for the second practice session.

programme.title: Japanese Grand Prix
programme.desc: The final practice session gets underway at Suzuka ahead of the all-important qualifying session.

programme.title: Japanese Grand Prix
programme.desc: Mercedes have secured pole in the opening two qualifying sessions this season and will look to do it again in Suzuka.

programme.title: Japanese Grand Prix
programme.desc: Mercedes arrives in dominant form following back-to-back 1-2 finishes, while Ferrari emerges as their primary threat, and defending champions McLaren fight to salvage their season after a nightmare start.
